name: The Green & Grind
about: The Green & Grind is a golf simulator venue focused on providing an accessible and enjoyable experience for players of all ages and skill levels. The facility combines indoor golf simulation with a full-service coffee bar, creating a dual-purpose environment for practice and relaxation. Services include personalized 1:1 instruction from PGA-certified coaches and access to state-of-the-art indoor simulators for skill refinement.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art indoor golf simulator for focused practice
Complementary coffee bar for relaxation and session review
Flexible scheduling and personalized instruction from PGA professionals

food_and_drink.notes: Full coffee bar available for refreshments and breaks between sessions

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether club rentals are available. It is recommended to bring your own clubs or contact the venue directly for clarification.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are allowed, as the venue features a complimentary coffee bar for clients to enjoy during their visit.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific timing details for a full 18-hole simulation. Duration may vary depending on player pace and simulator settings.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Green & Grind explicitly caters to families and offers lessons for all ages and skill levels, making it a kid-friendly environment.
